description.value:
Frequency once per 10 minutes

By touching a friend and concentrating, you can draw in harmful effects negatively impacting their emotions. Attempt a @Check[perception|options:counteract]{Counteract} check using your Perception modifier and a counteract rank equal to half your level (rounded up). If you succeed, the target gains temporary Hit Points equal to your level for a number of rounds equal to your Charisma modifier (minimum 1 round).

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.Effect: Absorb Vibe]
